features.name: paladin-lay-on-hands

grants_actions.name: paladin-lay-on-hands
grants_actions.summary: Touch a creature to restore HP from your healing pool, or expend 5 HP from the pool to cure one disease or neutralize one poison. Pool equals 5 × your Paladin level; fully restored on a Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Touch a creature to restore HP from your healing pool, or expend 5 HP from the pool to cure one disease or neutralize one poison. Pool equals 5 × your Paladin level; fully restored on a Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Touch a creature to restore HP from your healing pool, or expend 5 HP from the pool to cure one disease or neutralize one poison. Pool equals 5 × your Paladin level; fully restored on a Long Rest.

features.name: paladin-spellcasting
features.safe_summary: Charisma-based half-caster. Prepare a number of Paladin spells equal to half your Paladin level (rounded down) + your Charisma modifier. Spell slots follow the half-caster table, starting at level 2.
features.rules_summary: Charisma-based half-caster. Prepare a number of Paladin spells equal to half your Paladin level (rounded down) + your Charisma modifier. Spell slots follow the half-caster table, starting at level 2.

features.name: paladin-divine-smite
features.trigger: After hitting with a melee weapon or unarmed strike.
features.safe_summary: When you hit with a melee weapon or unarmed strike, expend a spell slot to deal extra Radiant damage: 2d8 for a 1st-level slot, +1d8 per slot level above 1st (max 5d8). Add +1d8 if the target is a Fiend or Undead.
features.rules_summary: When you hit with a melee weapon or unarmed strike, expend a spell slot to deal extra Radiant damage: 2d8 for a 1st-level slot, +1d8 per slot level above 1st (max 5d8). Add +1d8 if the target is a Fiend or Undead.

features.name: paladin-fighting-style
features.safe_summary: Choose one Fighting Style that permanently enhances your combat approach. Options include Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, Blessed Warrior, and Interception.
features.rules_summary: Choose one Fighting Style that permanently enhances your combat approach. Options include Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, Blessed Warrior, and Interception.

features.name: paladin-channel-divinity-1-use

grants_actions.name: paladin-channel-divinity-1-use
grants_actions.summary: Channel divine energy to fuel one of your Sacred Oath's Channel Divinity options. 1 use, regained on a Short or Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Channel divine energy to fuel one of your Sacred Oath's Channel Divinity options. 1 use, regained on a Short or Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Channel divine energy to fuel one of your Sacred Oath's Channel Divinity options. 1 use, regained on a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: paladin-sacred-oath-subclass
features.safe_summary: At level 3, choose your Sacred Oath subclass (Devotion, Ancients, Glory, Vengeance, or another). Your oath grants Oath Spells always prepared, two Channel Divinity options, and additional features at levels 3, 7, 15, and 20.
features.rules_summary: At level 3, choose your Sacred Oath subclass (Devotion, Ancients, Glory, Vengeance, or another). Your oath grants Oath Spells always prepared, two Channel Divinity options, and additional features at levels 3, 7, 15, and 20.

features.name: paladin-divine-health
features.safe_summary: Your divine power grants you immunity to disease. No saving throw required — diseases simply have no effect on you.
features.rules_summary: Your divine power grants you immunity to disease. No saving throw required — diseases simply have no effect on you.

features.name: paladin-extra-attack
features.safe_summary: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can attack twice instead of once.
features.rules_summary: When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can attack twice instead of once.

features.name: paladin-faithful-steed
features.safe_summary: Cast Find Steed once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. You can also cast it using a spell slot on additional castings. Your steed is a spirit that takes an appropriate animal form.
features.rules_summary: Cast Find Steed once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. You can also cast it using a spell slot on additional castings. Your steed is a spirit that takes an appropriate animal form.

features.name: paladin-aura-of-protection
features.safe_summary: While conscious, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you add your Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to all saving throws. Expands to 30 feet at level 18.
features.rules_summary: While conscious, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you add your Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to all saving throws. Expands to 30 feet at level 18.

features.name: paladin-radiant-strikes
features.safe_summary: Your melee weapon attacks and unarmed strikes deal an extra 1d8 Radiant damage on every hit. No resource cost — this bonus applies automatically.
features.rules_summary: Your melee weapon attacks and unarmed strikes deal an extra 1d8 Radiant damage on every hit. No resource cost — this bonus applies automatically.

features.name: paladin-restoring-touch
features.safe_summary: When you use Lay on Hands to restore HP to a creature, you can also end one condition on that creature (Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned) at no additional HP cost.
features.rules_summary: When you use Lay on Hands to restore HP to a creature, you can also end one condition on that creature (Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned) at no additional HP cost.

features.name: paladin-aura-expansion
features.safe_summary: The range of your Aura of Protection and Aura of Courage increases from 10 feet to 30 feet.
features.rules_summary: The range of your Aura of Protection and Aura of Courage increases from 10 feet to 30 feet.

features.name: paladin-epic-boon
features.safe_summary: Gain an Epic Boon feat — a powerful endgame reward available only at level 19. You also increase one ability score by 1 (up to a maximum of 30) as part of this feat.
features.rules_summary: Gain an Epic Boon feat — a powerful endgame reward available only at level 19. You also increase one ability score by 1 (up to a maximum of 30) as part of this feat.

features.name: paladin-ability-score-improvement
features.safe_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two different ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, replace this improvement with a feat. Maximum ability score of 20 applies. Gained at levels 4, 8, 12, and 16.
features.rules_summary: Increase one ability score by 2, or two different ability scores by 1 each. Alternatively, replace this improvement with a feat. Maximum ability score of 20 applies. Gained at levels 4, 8, 12, and 16.

features.name: paladin-aura-of-courage-10ft
features.safe_summary: While you are conscious, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be Frightened. Always active, no resource cost. Expands to 30 feet at level 18.
features.rules_summary: While you are conscious, you and friendly creatures within 10 feet of you can't be Frightened. Always active, no resource cost. Expands to 30 feet at level 18.

features.name: paladin-subclass-feature-6
features.safe_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants an additional feature at level 7. The exact ability depends on your chosen subclass (e.g., Aura of Devotion for Oath of Devotion, Elder Champion traits for Oath of the Ancients).
features.rules_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants an additional feature at level 7. The exact ability depends on your chosen subclass (e.g., Aura of Devotion for Oath of Devotion, Elder Champion traits for Oath of the Ancients).

features.name: paladin-aura-improvements
features.safe_summary: Level 9 is a spell slot progression milestone (3rd-level slots unlock). No new named aura feature is granted at this level — aura range expands at level 18.
features.rules_summary: Level 9 is a spell slot progression milestone (3rd-level slots unlock). No new named aura feature is granted at this level — aura range expands at level 18.

features.name: paladin-aura-of-courage-extension
features.safe_summary: At level 10, you gain your Sacred Oath's level 10 subclass feature. Aura of Courage's range does not expand until level 18 — refer to your subclass for what this level actually grants.
features.rules_summary: At level 10, you gain your Sacred Oath's level 10 subclass feature. Aura of Courage's range does not expand until level 18 — refer to your subclass for what this level actually grants.

features.name: paladin-subclass-feature-10
features.safe_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants a subclass feature at level 10. Examples: Oath of Devotion gains Holy Nimbus (level 20 capstone is separate); Oath of the Ancients grants Undying Sentinel; Oath of Vengeance grants Soul of Vengeance.
features.rules_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants a subclass feature at level 10. Examples: Oath of Devotion gains Holy Nimbus (level 20 capstone is separate); Oath of the Ancients grants Undying Sentinel; Oath of Vengeance grants Soul of Vengeance.

features.name: paladin-channel-divinity-2-uses

grants_actions.name: paladin-channel-divinity-2-uses
grants_actions.summary: Your Channel Divinity maximum increases to 2 uses. Both uses are regained when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

features.safe_summary: Your Channel Divinity maximum increases to 2 uses. Both uses are regained when you finish a Short or Long Rest.
features.rules_summary: Your Channel Divinity maximum increases to 2 uses. Both uses are regained when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: paladin-4th-level-spell-slots
features.safe_summary: At level 13, you gain your first 4th-level spell slots (1 slot, increasing to 2 at level 15). These allow you to cast 4th-level Paladin spells and deal up to 5d8 Radiant damage with Divine Smite.
features.rules_summary: At level 13, you gain your first 4th-level spell slots (1 slot, increasing to 2 at level 15). These allow you to cast 4th-level Paladin spells and deal up to 5d8 Radiant damage with Divine Smite.

features.name: paladin-subclass-feature-15
features.safe_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants a powerful level 15 feature. Examples: Oath of Devotion — Holy Nimbus (1/Long Rest); Oath of the Ancients — Elder Champion; Oath of Vengeance — Avenging Angel.
features.rules_summary: Your Sacred Oath grants a powerful level 15 feature. Examples: Oath of Devotion — Holy Nimbus (1/Long Rest); Oath of the Ancients — Elder Champion; Oath of Vengeance — Avenging Angel.

features.name: paladin-aura-of-protection-30ft
features.safe_summary: Your Aura of Protection now extends to 30 feet. You and friendly creatures within 30 feet add your Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to all saving throws while you are conscious.
features.rules_summary: Your Aura of Protection now extends to 30 feet. You and friendly creatures within 30 feet add your Charisma modifier (minimum +1) to all saving throws while you are conscious.

features.name: paladin-aura-of-courage-30ft
features.safe_summary: Your Aura of Courage now extends to 30 feet. You and friendly creatures within 30 feet can't be Frightened while you are conscious.
features.rules_summary: Your Aura of Courage now extends to 30 feet. You and friendly creatures within 30 feet can't be Frightened while you are conscious.

features.name: paladin-subclass-capstone
features.safe_summary: At level 20, your Sacred Oath grants its capstone feature — a transformative once-per-Long-Rest power that defines the pinnacle of your oath's identity.
features.rules_summary: At level 20, your Sacred Oath grants its capstone feature — a transformative once-per-Long-Rest power that defines the pinnacle of your oath's identity.

features.name: Divine Smite
features.safe_summary: Divine Smite is tracked as a Paladin feature. Needs table-specific rules text if your source differs.
features.rules_summary: Needs DM content
